Name: $AntiMatterReactor_L
Description:
The large antimatter reactor is the strongest reactor an independent pilot can find on the market. Extreme performance comes at a massive premium, and even with that fact, it's always out of stock. 

Harnessing antimatter power is a difficult task, let alone making it safe. To provide unparalleled safety and performance with such a dangerous power source is a Daazen trade secret, one that secured them control over a major part of the high quality component market.
